startups.name: EquiFlow
startups.description: Pledge tokenized US equities as collateral, borrow regulated stablecoins (USDG), and route the proceeds into yield — without selling a share. One signature, sponsored gas, no taxable sale.

startups.name: Soblox
startups.description: Soblox is a non-custodial decentralized savings platform built on Stellar's Soroban smart contracts. It enables individuals and communities to save transparently using stablecoins — with flexible, locked, goal-based, and group savings pools enforced fully on-chain. No middlemen. Full control. Built for emerging markets.

startups.name: extract-wechat-messages-linux
startups.description: Extract WeChat 4.x conversations on Linux (AUR wechat-bin) into compact LLM-ready text. Native /proc/PID/mem SQLCipher key recovery, AES-256-CBC per-page decrypt, three output formats (compact TXT / pseudo-XML / JSONL), token-aware chunking.

Strictly presentation layer with no blockchain logic inside.
